response.overview: Raising Kratos is a 2019 documentary film that chronicles the five-year development of the 2018 God of War video game, focusing on the challenges, risks, and creative process at Santa Monica Studio as they reinvented the franchise. Directed by Brandon Akiaten, the film follows game director Cory Barlog and the team as they navigate the pressure to evolve the series, showcasing the human side of game development, including personal struggles, creative breakthroughs, and the journey to create a critically acclaimed masterpiece. It is available to stream for free on the PlayStation YouTube channel.
response.tagline: "Facing an unknown future, one man must become the last chance for all."
response.title: Raising Kratos
